mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT p.ORDER_NO as orderNo, p.CUSTOMER_CD as customerCd, p.CUSTOMER_NM as customerNm, p.ITEM_CD as itemCd, i.ITEM_NM as itemNm, p.PLAN_QTY as orderQty, p.PLAN_DT as orderDt, p.DELIVERY_DT as deliveryDt FROM PLN_PROD_PLAN p LEFT JOIN MST_ITEM i ON p.ITEM_CD = i.ITEM_CD WHERE p.ORDER_NO IS NOT NULL AND p.ORDER_NO != ''
AND (p.ORDER_NO LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.CUSTOMER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY p.DELIVERY_DT ASC LIMIT 20
